active_batch.checkpoint_rule: review every 10 meaningful changes or 10 commits, whichever comes first

history.summary: Automatic operator state-rollup layer added and fed into the morning operator packet so the system can summarize what changed in the last cycle without manual reconstruction.
Operator escalation engine added and wired into the morning packet so stale blocked work, untouched critical lanes, and deferred commands now self-identify with severity and recommended touch.
Preview-only delegation readiness added to the unified operator queue so each lane now shows whether it is blocked, still needs operator work, or is clean enough for controlled delegation later.
